theoremName: shifted Xi de Branges kernel positivity theorem

augmentedClosedConeInputStatus.label: augmented Xi closed-cone input
augmentedClosedConeInputStatus.reason: The augmented Xi closed-cone theorem proves that the shifted-Xi de Branges kernel lies in the positive kernel cone obtained from augmented KLM pullbacks.

kernelEntryLimitStatus.label: kernel entry convergence
kernelEntryLimitStatus.reason: The same closed-cone theorem records entrywise convergence to the full shifted-Xi de Branges kernel on finite evaluation sets.

shiftedXiKernelPositivityStatus.label: shifted-Xi de Branges kernel positivity
shiftedXiKernelPositivityStatus.reason: For every finite upper-half-plane evaluation set, the Gram matrix of K_{E_omega} is positive semidefinite.

proof: Import the augmented Xi closed-cone limit theorem.
Read off entrywise convergence to the full shifted-Xi kernel.
Apply the finite positive-kernel cone conclusion to each finite evaluation set.
